machine.name: Community Services Community Executive Optimization Community Operations Digital Twin
machine.description: Community-services machine for community operations digital twin in the community executive optimization workstream. It monitors current load, forecast risk, resource allocation, and cross-domain throughput and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: current load, forecast risk, resource allocation, and cross-domain throughput
metadata.upstreamMachine: Community Services Community Executive Optimization Predictive Prevention Planner
downstreamMachines: Community Services Community Executive Optimization Public Trust Feedback Loop
metadata.crossDomainOutputPurpose: community digital twin into health learning-system dispatcher
agentActions: Dispatch housing_services_agent for urgent community-services intervention on community operations digital twin.
Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for community operations digital twin.
Create field work order or mobile team task for community operations digital twin.
Maintain monitored service path for community operations digital twin.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [3847:3851] feeds Community Services Community Executive Optimization Public Trust Feedback Loop.

sequences.name: Community Operations Digital Twin: WATCH -> URGENT_RESPONSE

metadata.description: Escalates resident or field risk into urgent response.

metadata.action: Dispatch housing_services_agent for urgent community-services intervention on community operations digital twin.

sequences.name: Community Operations Digital Twin: COORDINATION_NEEDED -> COORDINATE_SERVICES

metadata.action: Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for community operations digital twin.

sequences.name: Community Operations Digital Twin: FIELD_TASK_NEEDED -> FIELD_WORK_ORDER

metadata.description: Creates a field crew, outreach, or mobile response task.

metadata.action: Create field work order or mobile team task for community operations digital twin.

sequences.name: Community Operations Digital Twin: STABLE_PATH -> STABLE_SERVICE_PATH

metadata.description: Confirms resident service path is stable and monitored.

metadata.action: Maintain monitored service path for community operations digital twin.

inputSequences.name: Urgent response sequence
inputSequences.description: Two-step community risk escalation ending in urgent response.

inputSequences.name: Coordinate services
inputSequences.description: Coordinates health, public safety, housing, transit, or city service partners.

inputSequences.name: Field work order
inputSequences.description: Creates a field response or outreach task.

inputSequences.name: Stable service path
inputSequences.description: Confirms the resident or city service path is stable.

inputSequences.name: Baseline without output
inputSequences.description: Initial observation arms the urgent path without firing.
